ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the exchange */,
  "trading_hours_start" TEXT /* Time when the exchange opens for trading */,
  "trading_hours_end" TEXT /* Time when the exchange closes for trading */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the exchange operates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the stock belongs to */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the stock belongs to */,
  "subindustry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subindustry the stock belongs to */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was first listed */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the stock */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_subindustry_id FOREIGN KEY ("subindustry_id") REFERENCES stock_subindustry ("subindustry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES stock_sector ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES stock_industry ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "high" REAL /* High price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Low price of the stock on the given date */,
  "open" REAL /* Open price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Close price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted close price of the stock on the given date */,
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data feed from which the price data is sourced */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price record (for real-time data) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data (e.g., API, manual input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_feed_id FOREIGN KEY ("feed_id") REFERENCES data_feeds ("feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the data feed is obtained */,
  "feed_name" TEXT /* Name of the data feed */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data feed (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., stocks, options, futures) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feed (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "device" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the rate is applicable */,
  "rate_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange rate */,
  "rate_value" REAL /* Value of the exchange rate */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the exchange rate */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the exchange rate data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_sector" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sector was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sector data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_industry" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the industry was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the industry data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_subindustry" (
  "subindustry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subindustry */,
  "subindustry_name" TEXT /* Name of the subindustry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subindustry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subindustry was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the subindustry data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subindustry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_sector_data" (
  "sector_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector data record */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the stock in the sector */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the sector data was recorded */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the stock in the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_sector_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_sector_data_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES stock_sector ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_industry_data" (
  "industry_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry data record */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the stock in the industry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the industry data was recorded */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the stock in the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_industry_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_industry_data_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES stock_industry ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_subindustry_data" (
  "subindustry_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subindustry data record */,
  "subindustry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subindustry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the stock in the subindustry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the subindustry data was recorded */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the stock in the subindustry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subindustry_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_subindustry_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_subindustry_data_subindustry_id FOREIGN KEY ("subindustry_id") REFERENCES stock_subindustry ("subindustry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the trend data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trend */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES market_trends ("trend_id")
)
